goals.title: Merge origin/fix/bar-account into main after resolving conflicts by p...
goals.objective: Merge origin/fix/bar-account into main after resolving conflicts by preserving main's v2 AnalyzeResultView/CompetencyGap result structure, adding a sidebar for in-page navigation, adding a submitted cover-letter confirmation button and read-only modal, then completing the merge on main with tests and browser evidence. Stop only if merge conflicts require user choice; user already chose this resolution strategy.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI static contract: from frontend run npm run verify-design after conflicts are resolved; PASS iff it exits 0 and output says frontend design verification passed while preserving v2 CompetencyGap ownership and checking sidebar/modal cover-letter strings.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/bar-account-merge-20260625/evidence/C001-verify-design.txt: npm test exited 0 with frontend design verification passed | cleanup: no runtime process spawned

successCriteria.scenario: Browser happy path: run Playwright against /analyze/99 through frontend e2e analyze flow; PASS iff v2 result page keeps CompetencyGap, shows sidebar navigation, clicking sidebar anchors changes hash/active section, clicking 제출 자기소개서 확인 opens centered read-only dialog with structured Q/A items and long-content internal scrolling, and close returns focus without route navigation.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/bar-account-merge-20260625/evidence/C002-browser-analyze-flow.txt plus C002-result-desktop.png, C002-result-tablet.png, C002-result-mobile.png, C002-cover-letter-dialog.png, C004-raw-fallback-dialog.png: Chrome QA passed sidebar navigation, structured modal scroll, focus return, raw fallback | cleanup: stopped QA Vite process tree 3868; no listener on 5173

successCriteria.scenario: Regression suite: from frontend run npx playwright test tests/e2e/analyze-flow.spec.js after implementation; PASS iff manual posting, submitted cover-letter payload, v2 result UI, modal, reload persistence, and company fallback tests pass.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/bar-account-merge-20260625/evidence/C003-playwright-analyze-flow.txt: npx playwright test tests/e2e/analyze-flow.spec.js exited 0 with 4 passed | cleanup: Playwright web server/test worker exited

goals.blockedReason: work completed in merge commit 48a5f75, but completed legacy Codex goal objective mismatched ULW aggregate objective and blocks terminal complete checkpoint in this thread

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/bar-account-merge-20260625/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/bar-account-merge-20260625/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
